name: ArcelorMittal S.A.
h1: Arcelor Mittal's GCC footprint in India
lede: Arcelor Mittal runs nine capability centers across eight Indian cities. Pune, Kolkata, Hyderabad, Dabuna, Kirandul, Paradeep, Surat and Visakhapatnam, covering engineering & design, gcc/gic and manufacturing, built over eighteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Arcelor Mittal office in India. We map nine, across eight cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: ArcelorMittal S.A. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Arcelor Mittal runs 9 verified GCC centers across 8 Indian cities (Pune, Kolkata, Hyderabad, Dabuna, Kirandul, Paradeep, Surat, Visakhapatnam), covering engineering & design, gcc/gic and manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Arcelor Mittal's India footprint covers Pune, Kolkata, Hyderabad, Dabuna, Kirandul, Paradeep, Surat and Visakhapatnam, spanning engineering & design, gcc/gic and manufacturing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Iron and Steel Foundries, Precious Metals and Industrial Metals

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 22 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Arcelor Mittal operate in India?
faq.a: Arcelor Mittal operates 9 active Global Capability Center sites in India. Ten are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Arcelor Mittal have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Arcelor Mittal's India GCC footprint spans Pune, Kolkata, Hyderabad, Dabuna, Kirandul, Paradeep, Surat and Visakhapatnam.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Arcelor Mittal run in India?
faq.a: Arcelor Mittal runs engineering & design, gcc/gic and manufacturing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Arcelor Mittal's India GCCs?
faq.a: Arcelor Mittal's India centers employ in the 5,000 to 10,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Arcelor Mittal's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 22 leaders at Arcelor Mittal's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
